title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 433.140 - Petition — contents
text:
433.140.  Petition — contents. — The petition shall set forth the facts upon which the application for a discharge is founded, and shall be verified by the affidavit of the petitioner thereto annexed.
(RSMo 1939 § 3331) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2944; 1919 § 12700; 1909 § 11282
